name: Pierced by the Spear
oracleText:
Pierced by the Spear deals 3 damage to target creature or planeswalker.
If a permanent dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.
flavorText: "One of the soldiers with a spear pierced his side." — John 19:34
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Richard de Montbaston and collaborators's "Saint Longinus" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain medieval manuscript image on Wikimedia Commons.
classics.creditText: Richard de Montbaston and collaborators, Saint Longinus
classics.sourceNotes: Longinus serves as the clearest classics shorthand for the spear-piercing moment.
